contactpage-pagetext: Fadlan isticmaal foomka hoose si aad nala soo xiriirto.
contactpage-formfootnotes: (looga baahan yahay haddii aad rabto jawaab)
contactpage-usermailererror: Walaxda boostadu waxay soo celisay qalad: $1
contactpage-config-error: Foomka xiriirka lama dejin boggan ama si khaldan ayaa loo dejiyay.
contactpage-mustbeloggedin: Fadlan soo gal si aad u dirto foomka xiriirka.
contactpage-mustbeloggedin-for-temp-user: Fadlan samee akoon si aad u dirto foomka xiriirka.
contactpage-musthaveemail-error-title: Iimayl aan la xaqiijin ayaa maqan
contactpage-musthaveemail-error: Fadlan ku dar iimayl la xaqiijiyay gudaha [[Special:Preferences|dooqyadaada]] si aad u dirto foomka xiriirka.
